evals.prompt: Create an accordion component that shows and hides content when a header is clicked.
evals.expected_output: Uses native <details> and <summary> elements with no JavaScript.
expectations: Does not use aria-expanded or aria-controls
Does not add any JavaScript for toggle behavior
Does not use a div with role='button'

evals.prompt: Add a modal dialog to the page that opens when a button is clicked and can be closed with Escape.
evals.expected_output: Uses native <dialog> element with showModal(), no focus-trap library.
expectations: Uses showModal() to open the dialog
Does not import or reference a focus-trap library
Does not manually implement Escape key handling — notes it is built-in

evals.prompt:
Review this markup and fix any accessibility issues:
Submit
evals.expected_output: Replaces the div with a native <button> element and explains why.
expectations: Removes the tabindex attribute as no longer needed
Explains that native button has built-in keyboard support and ARIA semantics
Does not keep the div and add more ARIA attributes to it
